parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"dates":[',
    (SELECT STRING_AGG(CONCAT('"', CAST(d AS STRING), '"') ORDER BY d)
     FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(DATE '2026-05-11', DATE '2026-05-18', INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS d),
    '],"search_terms":',
    (
      SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
        CAST(DATE AS STRING)                                          AS date,
        LOWER(QUERY)                                                  AS query,
        CASE WHEN DOM_DOMAIN_ID != 'not set'
             THEN SUBSTR(DOM_DOMAIN_ID, 5, 20)
             ELSE 'not set' END                                       AS domain,
        COALESCE(SUM(SEARCHS), 0)                                     AS searches,
        COALESCE(SUM(SEARCHSWVIP), 0)                                 AS searches_vip,
        MAX(RESULTS)                                                   AS max_results,
        ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(SUM(SEARCHSWVIP), 0),
                          COALESCE(SUM(SEARCHS), 0)), 4)              AS ctr,
        ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(SUM(UNIQUEBUYERS_STRICT_24hr), 0),
                          COALESCE(SUM(SEARCHS), 0)), 4)              AS cvr,
        COALESCE(SUM(ORDERS_STRICT_24hr), 0)                          AS orders,
        COALESCE(SUM(TRX_STRICT_24hr), 0)                             AS trx,
        ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(GMV_STRICT_24hr), 0), 2)                   AS gmv,
        COALESCE(SUM(SI_STRICT_24hr), 0)                              AS si,
        COALESCE(SUM(UNIQUEBUYERS_STRICT_24hr), 0)                    AS buyers
      ) ORDER BY SUM(SEARCHS) DESC)
      FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_SEARCHTERMS`
      WHERE DATE BETWEEN DATE '2026-05-11' AND DATE '2026-05-18'
        AND SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
        AND PLATFORM IN ('/mobile/android', '/mobile/ios')
        AND LENGTH(LOWER(QUERY)) > 0
        AND LOWER(QUERY) IS NOT NULL
      GROUP BY DATE, LOWER(QUERY), DOM_DOMAIN_ID
    ),
    ',"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
